center.name: 內格羅河 (阿根廷)
center.summary: 內格羅河 (阿根廷)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括叉尾王霸鹟、Pectoral sparrow，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pectoral sparrow is non-migratory and can be found everywhere in the Amazon Basin east of the Andes except for the western parts between the Negro and Purus rivers. Besides the Amazon jungle, it is found in eastern and north-eastern Brazil. It occupies altitudes up to in southern Venezuela, in southeastern Peru, and in Bolivia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: savana, is found in central and southern Brazil, Bolivia, Paraguay, Uruguay, and Argentina (south to the Río Negro), and overwinters in Amazonia, a large portion of northern South America (i.e., within the Orinoco River Basin), and Trinidad and Tobago, occasionally appearing in the West Indies.{{Cite journal|last=Rosenberg|first=Gary H.|date=July 2010|title=Field Guide to the Songbirds of South America.— Robert S
